_description: Pre-Notion filter rules. Applied BEFORE creating Notion pages. Jobs matching these rules go straight to Archive in TSV, never reach Notion.

company_cap.note: ATS systems may deprioritize candidates with too many applications to same company

company_blocklist._description: Companies where ALL roles are a weak fit for this candidate. Auto-archive.

title_blocklist._description: Title patterns that auto-archive regardless of company. Matched case-insensitively as substrings.

location_rules._description: Restrict to specific locations / remote-only. Empty = no location filter.
